description: Learn how to earn and use Binance Alpha Points, including exclusive opportunities like Airdrops and Wallet Booster programs. Understand the calculation of Alpha Points based on holdings and trading volume, and how to access special rewards on the Binance platform. [t=0:16]
topic_summary: This video provides a comprehensive guide on Binance Alpha Points, detailing their significance, how to earn them through trading and holding, and the benefits of participating in Binance Alpha events. [t=0:16]
